|Harvest Peak Capital

Escalations

Playbooks

Escalation Tasks

Define the tasks that require human attention. System tasks originate from Entrata workflows; custom tasks are created by your team.

System tasks are generated by Entrata workflows. Assign each to a specialty to control routing and team ownership.

TaskWorkflowPrioritySpecialtyDescription
Review SOP DocumentDocument ApprovalReview and approve a submitted SOP document change
Approve Policy ChangeDocument ApprovalApprove updates to a property or portfolio-level policy
Review Training MaterialDocument ApprovalReview submitted training material before publishing
Fair Housing ReviewComplianceReview flagged communication for fair housing compliance
Background Check ReviewComplianceManually review a flagged background check result
Complete Training ModuleTrainings & SOPComplete an assigned training module by the due date
Acknowledge SOP UpdateTrainings & SOPRead and acknowledge an updated SOP document
Approve ApplicationLeasingApprove an application to move onto the leasing stage
Approve for ScreeningLeasingApprove the application and attachments for screening
Approve Screening ResultsLeasingMake a decision based on returned screening results
Generate LeaseLeasingGenerate a lease packet for the applicant(s) to sign
Countersign LeaseLeasingCountersign the lease once all applicants have signed
Applicant Follow UpLeasingFollow up with a lead on their application status
Lead Follow UpLeasingReach out to a prospect who has gone cold
Manual Screen ApplicantLeasingManually screen an applicant who cannot be auto-screened
Reject ApplicationsLeasingProcess and send rejection notices for denied applications
Emergency Work OrderMaintenanceRespond to an emergency maintenance request
Vendor DispatchMaintenanceCoordinate with an external vendor for specialized repair
Unit Turn InspectionMaintenanceInspect a vacated unit and create the punch list
Preventive MaintenanceMaintenanceComplete scheduled preventive maintenance task
Renewal Offer ReviewRenewalsReview and approve renewal offer terms before sending
Early Termination RequestRenewalsProcess an early lease termination request
Renewal Follow UpRenewalsFollow up with resident on pending renewal offer
Ledger AdjustmentAccountingApprove a manual ledger adjustment or credit
Refund ProcessingAccountingProcess and approve a resident refund request
